title: RichText
description: A Rich Text object represents styled text content in Notion. Rich text can include annotations like bold, italic, and color, as well as links and mentions of other Notion objects.

type.description: The type of this rich text object.

text.description: Text content and optional link. Present when type is "text".

url.description: The URL the text links to.

mention.description: Mention content. Present when type is "mention". Can reference users, pages, databases, dates, or link previews.

equation.description: Equation content in KaTeX format. Present when type is "equation".

annotations.description: Styling annotations applied to the text.

strikethrough.description: Whether the text has a strikethrough.

code.description: Whether the text is formatted as inline code.

color.description: The color of the text. Possible values include default, gray, brown, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, pink, red, and their background variants (e.g., gray_background).

plain_text.description: The plain text content without annotations.

href.description: The URL of any link in the text, or null.
